sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81053" key="periakoni/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιᾰκονίζω</orth>, dub.l. in Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:p.118B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.118B.</biblScope> </bibl> (fort. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περιηγκωνισμένον</foreign>).</entryFree>
